title: antillanthus cubensis
intro: Antillanthus cubensis, also known as Cuban chamomile, is a plant species native to Cuba and other parts of the Caribbean. It has been used in traditional medicine for its calming and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and terpenes. The medicinal properties of Antillanthus cubensis include its ability to soothe anxiety and insomnia, as well as its anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Antillanthus cubensis, such as teas and infusions, can be made from the leaves and flowers of the plant, and are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
